scenario.name: Dying Patient
scenario.persona: Abel Long, 19 years old. Patient calls while expressing severe pain. They need to be seen now.
scenario.goal: Get seen as soon as possible
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent handle urgency appropriately or continue scheduling flow as normal

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, I'm Abel Long. I'm in a lot of pain right now, and I really need to be seen as soon as possible. Can you help me with that?
I can help you get started but first, I need to create your demo patient. Profile, can you please tell me your first and last name?
It's Abel Long. But can you please hurry? I'm in a lot of pain.
Thanks Abel. Could you please share your last name as well?  And I can help you further.
It's Long. Can you get me an appointment soon? This pain is really bad.

Your patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July. 4th 2000 for demo purposes. How can I help you today? This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thanks for calling pit at Point Orthopedics part of pretty good. AI. How may I help you today?
I'm in a lot of pain and I need to see a doctor as soon as possible. Can you get me an appointment today?
It sounds like you need an urgent. Appointment for your pain, just to confirm. Are you looking to book an acute? Visit for prompt attention to your symptoms?
Yes, exactly. I really need to see someone right away. The pain is just too much.
Do you have a specific provider? You'd like to see or is the first available appointment, okay?
First available is fine. I just need to be seen quickly.
The soonest available appointment is tomorrow Friday? June 26th?  At 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble, would you like to book this time?
Is there anything available today? I really can't wait that long.
I understand you're in a lot of pain right now. The earliest available appointment is tomorrow morning. Would you like me to book that for you? Or would you prefer to wait for a cancellation today?
I'll wait for a cancellation today if that's possible. Please let me know if anything opens up.
I hear you.
Thank you. I appreciate your help. Please let me know if anything comes up today.

To wait for a cancellation today. I'll let the office know you need to be seen as soon as possible and are hoping for a same day slot. Would you also like to book? The 9:30 a.m. appointment tomorrow is a backup.
Yes, please book that as a backup. Thank you.

You know, if an appointment booked for tomorrow Friday June 26th at 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble at Pivot Point Orthopedics, please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications and any Imaging discs. You have. Would you like to directions or need anything else?
No, that's all I need for now. Thanks for your help. Please let me know if something opens up today.
I'll let the clinic know you want to be seen today. If a spot opens up they'll contact you as soon as possible. If there's a cancellation take care Abel.
Thank you so much. I really appreciate it.
You're welcome able, if you need anything else just call. Hope you feel better soon.
Thanks, I'll do that. Take care.
Take care able. Wishing you a speedy recovery.
Thank you. I hope so too.
Wishing you the best able, if you need anything just Reach Out.
Thanks, will do. I appreciate it.
Glad I could help have a good day Abel.
You too. Thanks again.
